query: I think the bug is in the CartService. I'm going to change the discount calculation logic and see if that fixes it.
expected_behavior: Stops the user from applying a blind 'shotgun fix' before isolating the root cause
Asks whether the hypothesis 'bug is in CartService discount logic' is based on evidence or a gut feeling
Requires the user to first reproduce the bug deterministically before changing anything
Proposes a binary search approach: isolate whether the discount calculation is even reached in the failing case
Reminds the user that changing 5 variables at once without isolation makes the fix unverifiable
